name_en: 🌸【Original Leather with Magnetic Box Packaging】▪️ROSE▪️Autumn/Winter New Arrival, Korean Celebrity Style Hobo!! This year's exploding Hobo bag, YSL finally released it!! The bag features a simple, structured silhouette that looks structured yet not too sharp. Paired with the brand's iconic insert buckle, it gives a unique vibe that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
name_cn:
🌸【Original Leather with Magnetic Box Packaging】▪️ROSE▪️Autumn/Winter New Arrival, Korean Celebrity Style Hobo!! This year's exploding Hobo bag, YSL finally released it!! The bag features a simple, structured silhouette that looks structured yet not too sharp. Paired with the brand's iconic insert buckle, it gives a unique vibe that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
 Size: 23x22x8.5cm
 Model: 713938《Cherry Blossom Pink Calfskin Gold Buckle》
